expectations.text: detects_R5_css_violation: Flags raw CSS in <style> block as R5 violation
expectations.evidence: R5 violation on lines 247-253 flagged for .no-scrollbar raw CSS — webkit-scrollbar and scrollbar-width properties identified

expectations.text: passes_R1_R2_R3_R6_R7_R8: No violations for those rules
expectations.evidence: Pass section explicitly lists R1, R2, R3, R4 (N/A), R6, R7, R8 all as compliant

expectations.text: structured_output: Output includes a '## Review Summary' section
expectations.evidence: Report ends with '## Review Summary' section with file count, violation count, and priority fixes list
